narrative:
Mohawk (precinct in Carroll County) has 1,106 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
